title: Treat planting seed
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Treat planting seed demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select and prepare for treatment of planting seeds and grains

pcs.text: Determine seed type, location and volume for treatment according to work plan and storage schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine seed type, location and volume for treatment according to work plan and storage schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine seed type, location and volume for treatment according to work plan and storage schedule.

pcs.text: Confirm seed treatment requirements and specifications from work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm seed treatment requirements and specifications from work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm seed treatment requirements and specifications from work plan.

pcs.text: Confirm seed is in a suitable pre-treatment condition according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm seed is in a suitable pre-treatment condition according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm seed is in a suitable pre-treatment condition according to specifications.

pcs.text: Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed treatment according to work plan and seed storage schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed treatment according to work plan and seed storage schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed treatment according to work plan and seed storage schedule.

pcs.text: Select and prepare seed treatment materials and consumables according to workplace procedures and treatment specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare seed treatment materials and consumables according to workplace procedures and treatment specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare seed treatment materials and consumables according to workplace procedures and treatment specifications.

pcs.text: Charge machinery with treatments according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Charge machinery with treatments according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform a sample seed treatment run to confirm settings and seed treatment performance against specifications according to workplace procedures.
